description: Use this API to change a node number in an existing substation. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.0.1. ierr = station_node_number(station, node, newnode)

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Number of the node to be changed. (input).

parameters.name: newnode
parameters.description: New number to be assigned to the node. (input).

error_codes.description: node number is already assigned to another node in the substation.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
